overall.description: A third-person perspective walkthrough of a futuristic cyberpunk city at night, featuring neon-lit streets, wet reflective surfaces, and dense urban architecture. The camera follows various NPCs through covered sidewalks, open plazas, and elevated walkways in gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077.

agents.ego_description: following an NPC in pink clothing along a red-painted sidewalk beneath an overpass

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in bright pink top walking ahead of camera

entered.detail: distinctive red-painted sidewalk running under the overpass
tall building covered in bright neon advertisements and holographic displays
concrete overpass covering the walkway with support columns
road with futuristic cars and traffic visible to the left
mature tree with thick trunk planted on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a covered red pedestrian walkway beneath an overpass in a futuristic city. Neon billboards illuminate the left side while traffic passes on the street. The camera follows a pedestrian in pink clothing through this narrow, sheltered corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza leading to building entrance with stairs

events.description: exits covered sidewalk into open plaza with wet reflective concrete ground
begins ascending wide concrete stairs toward building entrance

agents.ego_description: approaching and beginning to climb stairs while following an NPC carrying a glowing red umbrella

notable_agents.action: pedestrian holding a glowing red umbrella walking toward the stairs

entered.detail: open plaza area with wet reflective concrete surface showing rain reflections
wide concrete stairs leading up to a commercial building entrance
large neon sign with stylized asian characters glowing blue and purple
commercial storefronts illuminated with green neon lighting

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the covered walkway into an open plaza with wet reflective ground. A pedestrian with a glowing red umbrella leads the way toward a building entrance featuring wide concrete stairs and bright neon signage with stylized characters.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor stairway between commercial buildings with cherry trees

events.description: continues ascending multi-flight stairs passing other pedestrians

agents.ego_description: climbing stairs following various NPCs including one in a bright green top and another in blue

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in bright green top and pink pants ascending stairs ahead

entered.detail: flight of concrete stairs ascending between tall buildings
tall cylindrical building wrapped in multiple digital advertising screens
tree with pink blossoms growing alongside the stairway
transparent glass safety railing with metal support frame
multi-level highway structure with green neon accent lighting

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends a long flight of outdoor concrete stairs between buildings, passing cherry blossom trees and following pedestrians in colorful clothing. A distinctive cylindrical advertising tower dominates the view ahead while an elevated highway structure runs parallel on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway overlooking busy intersection

events.description: reaches top of stairs and transitions to elevated walkway with glass railings
observing futuristic vehicles moving through the intersection below the walkway

agents.ego_description: walking along elevated walkway overlooking the street below, observing traffic and neon billboards

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red shirt walking in opposite direction past the camera

entered.detail: raised pedestrian walkway with tiled surface and overhead cover
busy street intersection visible below the elevated walkway
circular purple neon sign mounted on the building facade

segments.scene_description: Reaching the top of the stairs, the scene opens onto an elevated walkway with glass railings overlooking a busy intersection. The cylindrical ad tower now stands to the left while futuristic vehicles navigate the streets below. The walkway is lined with green-lit railings and offers a panoramic view of the neon-lit cityscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: corner of elevated walkway with traffic view

events.description: turns left at corner of elevated walkway revealing new view of the street

agents.ego_description: turning left at the walkway corner while observing traffic below and the surrounding neon architecture

notable_agents.action: futuristic black car driving through the intersection below the walkway

entered.detail: yellow striped pedestrian crossing painted on the street below
building front with large red neon signage and geometric patterns

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left at the corner of the elevated walkway, shifting the glass railing from right to left. The cylindrical tower and purple sign pass behind as the view opens to a busy intersection with yellow crosswalk markings and futuristic vehicles passing below.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a sheltered urban corridor into an expansive, elevated vista of a neon-lit cyberpunk city. It begins by following a pedestrian in pink clothing through a narrow, red-covered walkway beneath an overpass, where neon billboards cast a glow over the passing traffic. As the camera exits the shelter, the scene opens into a wet, reflective plaza where a figure with a glowing red umbrella leads the way toward a set of wide concrete stairs. The camera then ascends these stairs past cherry blossom trees and a towering cylindrical advertisement, moving upward until it reaches an elevated walkway with glass railings that overlook a bustling intersection. Finally, the view shifts as the camera turns a corner, leaving the advertising tower behind to reveal a panoramic perspective of futuristic vehicles navigating yellow crosswalks far below.
